name: ExportConfiguration
description: Configuration for an export deployment operation specifying what to export and how.

exportType.description: Specifies the kind of export being performed. Use package for a single package or application for one or more applications.

uuids.description: Array of UUIDs to export. For packages, provide a single UUID. For applications, provide one or more application UUIDs.

name.description: Custom name for the deployment. If omitted, a name is auto-generated.

description.description: Description of the deployment, displayed in Appian Designer.
